MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_ATTACK.title: Strike
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ONE.description: Gain {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red], return 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ONE.title: Card One
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ONE.selectionScre: Choose 1 card to return to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWO.title: Card Two
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWO.description: At end of turn, trigger [red]Justice[/red]'s healing effect 1 extra time.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FOUR.title: Card Four
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIVE.title: Card Five
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIVE.description: Spend all [red]Justice[/red]. Attack random enemies that many times for {Damage:diff()} damage.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIX.title: Card Six
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIX.description: Draw cards equal to your [red]Perjury[/red]. Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} equal to your [red]Justice[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SEVEN.title: Card Seven
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_EIGHT.title: Card Eight
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TEN.title: Card Ten
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ELEVEN.title: Card Eleven
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ELEVEN.descriptio: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. You may Exhaust up to {Cards:diff()} cards to gain that much [red]Perjury[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWELVE.descriptio: Gain 6 Strength, 5 Dexterity, and 9 Perjury this turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FOURTEEN.title: Card Fourteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIFTEEN.title: Card Fifteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIFTEEN.descripti: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [red]Justice[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIXTEEN.title: Card Sixteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIXTEEN.descripti: Draw until you draw an Attack. Gain [red]Perjury[/red] equal to the number of cards drawn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SEVEN_TEEN.title: Card Seventeen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SEVEN_TEEN.descri:
Gain 1 [red]Justice[/red]. Return this to your hand when you gain 4 [red]Perjury[/red]{IfUpgraded:show:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.|}
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_EIGHTEEN.title: Card Eighteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_EIGHTEEN.descript: Spend {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Return this to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY.title: Card Twenty
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY.descriptio: Whenever [red]Perjury[/red] converts into [red]Justice[/red], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw 1 card.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_ONE.title: Card Twenty-One
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_ONE.descri: Spend {JusticePower:diff()} [red]Justice[/red] and {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, reduce {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength, and return this next turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DEATH_REWIND.title: Death Rewind
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DEATH_REWIND.descripti:
[b]Magic[/b]
[red][fade_in]"Is this... a [b]rewind[/b]? To me, this is unforgivable. To me, this is wrong."[/fade_in][/red]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_DEFEND.title: Defend
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MENTAL_TRAUMA.title: Mental Trauma
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_TWO.title: Card Twenty-Two
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_FOUR.descr: On turns where Perjury converts into Justice, damage you take cannot exceed {CardTwentyFourPower:diff()}.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SEVEN.sele: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards to return to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SEVEN.desc: Return {Cards:diff()} cards from your Exhaust pile to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_EIGHT.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Choose {Cards:diff()} cards, then gain {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_EIGHT.sele: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards to put into your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE.description:
[red][b]"My wish is only one thing... to meet everyone again. For that... I will save everyone."[/b][/red]
Create a [red]Save[/red] that gives a chosen teammate 100 [red]Justice[/red], gain 100 [b]Witchification[/b], gain 2 [b]Ritual Ceremony[/b], choose and play 3 Attacks from your piles for free and gain Block equal to damage dealt, then next turn gain 3 [red]Justice[/red], 3 Energy, and draw 3 cards.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE.title: Justice
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE.selectionScree: Choose 3 Attack cards to play and gain Block equal to the damage dealt.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SAVE.title: Save
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SIX.title: Card Twenty-Six
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SIX.descri: Gain 3 Perjury, deal 4 damage, gain 5 Witchification.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_FIVE.title: Card Twenty-Five
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_FIVE.descr:
Discard all cards in your hand.
For each card discarded, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:CardTwentySix+|CardTwentySix}[/gold] to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_WITH.title: Witch Power
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_WITH.description:
[red][b]"Ah, so you were with me all along..."[/b][/red]
Usable at 100 [b]Witchification[/b]. Gain 1 [b]Ritual Ceremony[/b], gain 2 Intangible, and double your damage next turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHADOW_SLASH.title: Shadow Slash
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHADOW_SLASH.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If a card was played via [red]Transmigration[/red] this turn, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ATTACKSIXSIX.title: Final Trial
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ATTACKSIXSIX.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you've played 3+ Attack cards this turn, gain 1 [b]Judgement Chain[/b].
